description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in dark brown leather or leather-like material, featuring prominent white stitching in a grid pattern across the seat and backrest surfaces. The sofa has a modern, slightly curved design with thick, padded armrests at both ends and a continuous, plush backrest with deep tufting for added comfort and visual interest. The seat cushions are integrated and uniform, matching the backrest in both color and stitching detail. The base of the sofa is solid and low to the ground, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and substantial appearance. The overall form is sleek yet inviting, suitable for spacious urban interiors or communal lounge areas. Its construction suggests durability and comfort, making it ideal for high-traffic environments.
description: A large, L-shaped dark brown leather sectional sofa with white grid stitching, deep tufting, and thick padded armrests. The design is modern, plush, and visually substantial.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shape, tufted backrest, thick armrests, and grid-stitched seat cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the sectional, the continuous backrest, and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back and the gentle curve of the sofa's structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the curved backrest and the solid, low-profile base.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six attached, uniform seat cushions and six matching back cushions arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout, all featuring deep tufting and grid-patterned stitching.
attribute_armrest_style: Both ends have thick, padded armrests that are slightly curved and rise just above the seat height, with a modern, blocky profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible; the base appears solid and continuous, suggesting a hidden or recessed support structure integrated into the sofa's frame.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, high backrest with deep tufting and attached cushions, following the L-shape and providing full support along the entire length.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Dark brown leather with a prominent white grid stitching pattern and deep tufting, giving a quilted, textured appearance.
